case_title: LAUREN VOLKMANN ET AL VS. SANDIE TAYLOR DBA FURHAVEN K9S

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $757.75 FILED BY VOLKMANN, LAUREN CUNNINGHAM, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDIE TAYLOR DBA FURHAVEN K9S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOLKMANN, LAUREN CUNNINGHAM, COREY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDIE TAYLOR DBA FURHAVEN K9S
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S LAUREN VOLKMANN AND COREY CUNNINGHAM ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDIE TAYLOR DBA FURHAVEN K9S IS NOT PRESENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING DEFENDANT FILED A CHALLENGE TO VENUE. AFTER REVIEWING EVIDENCE AND HEARING TESTIMONY FROM PLAINTIFF'S, JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN DETERMINED SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PROPER VENUE AND DISMISSED THIS MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE DURING PROCEEDING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY VOLKMANN, LAUREN CUNNINGHAM, COREY
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-03-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDIE TAYLOR DBA FURHAVEN K9S
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT SANDIE TAYLOR DBA FURHAVEN K9S AS TO PLAINTIFF VOLKMANN, LAUREN CUNNINGHAM, COREY
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
